title: codengine bundle
description: The orchestrator topology: a descriptor that references module packages and workflows, with no source of its own. The portable, resolved equivalent of a manifest. Version 1.

kind.description: Discriminates a bundle from a module package.

workflows.description: Relative paths to workflow IR documents (see workflow.schema.json).

modules.description: Module namespace -> the module package that provides it.

name.description: The module namespace, as referenced by the workflows.

package.description: The module package coordinate ("name@version") or a relative path to it.
